{
  "format": "llmario-theme-v1",
  "id": "desert",
  "title": "LLMario Desert Slope Art Lab v1b — Clean Caps",
  "sourceFormat": "llmcart-toybox-recipe",
  "sourceCartVersion": 7,
  "notes": [
    "Extracted from a truth-marked legacy llmcart/theme file.",
    "This file is an asset/theme pack: it defines images, recipes, placeables, and collision truth, not level layout.",
    "Maps should reference these asset/placeable ids instead of embedding base64 image data."
  ],
  "primer": {
    "baseline": "Built for super_llmario_toybox_cart_v74_solid_sprite_underside_guard.htmlz.",
    "history": [
      "v60 normalized generated cartridge placement so signs, surfaces, and scenery stop being bananas.",
      "v62 added self-contained PNG asset bundles inside .llmcart.txt files and seam-safe image terrain.",
      "v65 added a row-camera seam: falling between rows briefly reframes the next strip of play.",
      "v66 added solid:true support for cartridge image sprites so playable-looking asset chunks can be collision-backed.",
      "v2 adds desert-skinned bonk boxes using the v67 bonk-box contract: glassy info, solid reward, structural inert, muted used.",
      "Art lab variant that adds desert slope skins derived directly from the supplied DesertTileset PNG tiles.",
      "Tests steep and gentle uphill/downhill desert slopes with the same slope physics proven in v72-v74."
    ],
    "generatorRules": [
      "Think in rows: a main/upper strip can drop to a lower strip without becoming maze topology.",
      "Keep required row drops readable: coin trail, wide catch platform, and one tactical object below.",
      "Never let a block-shaped image be fake scenery unless it is clearly decorative. Solid-looking pieces need either platform geometry or solid:true collision.",
      "Use background/scenery to sell the world; use platforms/enemies/coins to sell the gameplay rhythm.",
      "Coins are breadcrumbs and jump arcs, not random confetti."
    ],
    "rowCameraIntent": "This cart is a real gameplay sampler: an upper-row route drops into a lower-row route, with coins/enemy/catch-platform making the seam readable."
  },
  "engineContract": "toybox-recipe-side-scroller-v1+image-assets-v1+row-camera-latched-seam-v1+solid-image-sprites-v1+bonk-box-contract-v1+slope-platforms-v1+image-slope-skins-v1+solid-underside-guard-v1",
  "resources": [
    {
      "id": "opengameart_free_desert_platformer_tileset",
      "title": "Free Desert Platformer Tileset",
      "source": "https://opengameart.org/content/free-desert-platformer-tileset",
      "attribution": "No attribution requested in supplied notes / source page."
    },
    {
      "id": "llmario_generated_desert_theme_boxes_v1",
      "title": "LLMario Desert Theme Box Skins v1",
      "artist": "Generated in ChatGPT with user direction",
      "source": "Local/generated cart booster art",
      "license": "Project-local generated asset; no external attribution requested",
      "usedFor": [
        "info box skin",
        "reward box skin",
        "inert box skin",
        "used/empty box skin"
      ],
      "note": "Generated to match the loaded theme while preserving the bonk-box role grammar."
    },
    {
      "id": "llmario_desert_slope_skins_v1",
      "title": "LLMario Desert Slope Skins v1",
      "artist": "Derived from supplied DesertTileset PNG tiles",
      "source": "DesertTileset(1).zip user-supplied pack",
      "license": "Follows supplied pack provenance",
      "usedFor": [
        "desert slope skins"
      ],
      "note": "Steep and gentle uphill/downhill desert slopes composed directly from the source tiles."
    },
    {
      "id": "llmario_desert_slope_lab_v1b_fix",
      "title": "Desert slope lab v1b cleanup",
      "note": "Keeps v1 slope sprites, but switches flat lab platforms to capless middle tiles so the desert side-edge transparency does not create cyan gutters. Also uses engine-native message/sign/enemy shapes."
    }
  ],
